label: Auroraglass Chanter Cell
description: Auroraglass Chanter Cell serves as a private sleeping chamber set within the Temple of the Rift-Vigil’s basalt fabric, its walls ribbed with slagcrete buttressing that dampens the city’s ash-driven vibration. A narrow auroraglass slit admits bruise-colored bands of light that cut across a low pallet platform, a prayer niche, and a lockfast footlocker set into the masonry. Copper grounding strips trace the corners and lintels, tying the room into the temple’s lattice for bleeding electrostatic charge. Vox-silencing insulation thickens the door and ceiling, rendering the cell a sealed refuge from Ashenward City’s fractured transmissions and storm-scraped acoustics.
